b161324f1e248d413e9ebcd51d8d45b47196cd73: Mr. Khuat Viet Hung works at Vietjet
03f99a2b96f742accf94a2e6e8411f7fb93ebec7: Vietjet consolidates leadership for the 2022-2027 term with changes in the Board of Directors and executive board. At the end of April, Mr. Khuat Viet Hung was elected as a member of the Board of Directors after resigning from Hanoi Metro and quitting his job as desired on April 15. Mr. Hung has experience in transportation management and traffic safety, having held positions at the Institute of Transportation Planning and Management, Department of Transportation and National Traffic Safety Committee. Vietjet appointed Mr. Nguyen Thanh Son, member of the Board of Directors, as General Director from April 29, replacing Mr. Dinh Viet Phuong. Mr. Phuong was elected First Vice Chairman of the Board of Directors for the 2022-2027 term; The impact on VJC stock tends to be neutral to positive if the management transfer is stable.
5a8d5d9e549b9d585c69b00acbc935f3a9f6ed01: Gold doesn't make a profit, why do so many people worship it?
879d3aaf1f8bef1ec72ac32e8cda679deb047a71: Experts believe that the root of the "cult" of gold does not only come from hoarding psychology but reflects limitations in the development of the financial system. Gold is considered an asset that does not add value to the economy, so cash flow into gold can reduce the efficiency of capital allocation. The central solution is to improve investor confidence in the financial market instead of relying solely on administrative measures. This implies the need to improve the quality of investment products, market transparency and policy stability to attract capital away from gold. Positive indirect impact for the stock market and banks if financial confidence improves, but the article does not mention specific stocks for individual evaluation.
dcb8fee332817e5f2635d17a2ca2f2b2fb400a8f: The world's largest fund continues to "discharge" tons of gold
bce80de85fa6ffaf5112d87a5511a5d6b6d38bd4: SPDR Gold Trust fund sold a net of 3.4 tons of gold on April 30, extending the net selling chain to 9 sessions with a total sale of 24.8 tons. The fund's gold holdings decreased to about 1,036 tons, showing that gold ETF capital flows are still weak despite the price recovery. World gold prices increased 1.7% in the last session of April and regained the mark of 4,600 USD/oz, after falling nearly 4,500 USD/oz on April 29. Short-term motivation comes from the weakening USD and oil prices, making gold more attractive to buyers outside the US. TD Securities believes that gold remains under pressure from inflation risks, high real interest rates and weak institutional demand, but maintains a positive long-term forecast with year-end prices above 5,000 USD/oz.
6664270bbf8f18f0b90404a2c705688940c2ff02: Apple announced that John Ternus will succeed Tim Cook as CEO from September 1, while Tim Cook will move to the role of Executive Chairman. After the announcement, Tim Cook sent two letters to Apple employees and the user community. The news also prompted international stories about billionaire Ly Gia Thanh, a technology billionaire who awarded nearly 200 million VND to employees who gave birth, a Greek shipping billionaire, and Forbes' list of the 10 richest women in the world. The domestic law section recorded that Chairman of ATV Jewelry Company Vu ​​Tuan Anh was accused of fraud by mobilizing capital for illegal gold and silver deposits, and Ms. Nguyen Ngoc Tien was temporarily detained by Ho Chi Minh City Police on March 20. The impact on Apple shares, if enough data is available, is neutral in the short term, because the CEO transfer has a clear milestone but the article does not mention price reaction or change in business strategy.
badcd95b93594348ee9fa778e985cc41d399b17a: Chairman of the Vietnam General Confederation of Labor: Workers need to improve their skills and creativity to contribute to growth
c076555e37fdc9b4e6a0047332bd527252e3d5ba: Chairman of the Vietnam General Confederation of Labor Nguyen Anh Tuan sent a letter on the 140th anniversary of International Labor Day, calling on workers to improve their qualifications, skills, discipline and industrial behavior. He recalled the origins of the Chicago workers' movement demanding an 8-hour workday, considering this a foundation of solidarity and protection of global labor rights. In Vietnam, Trade Unions continue to emphasize their caring role through programs such as "Tet Reunion", "Worker's Month", "Trade Union Shelter" and "Union Welfare". In the new period, the Trade Union guides the action program for the 2026-2031 term, associated with the goal of double-digit growth and sustainable development. The message has a positive long-term macroeconomic impact by promoting labor productivity and innovation, but the article does not mention specific businesses or stocks to evaluate the direct impact.
1eb4b529aa16d99b7468b0b36105cb1018eb32c8: Bao Viet Group: Consolidated pre-tax profit in the first quarter of 2026 reached VND 1,006 billion, an increase of 18.7%
3c4503b2b5dea9b3c08be10cad1488ce8f573907: Bao Viet Group (BHV) announced pre-reviewed business results for the first quarter of 2026 with consolidated revenue of 15,610 billion VND, up 9.1%, profit before tax of 1,006 billion VND, up 18.7% and profit after tax of 816 billion VND, up 18.8% over the same period. As of March 31, 2026, total consolidated assets reached VND 307,488 billion, an increase of 5.4% compared to the end of 2025; The parent company alone recorded revenue of 493 billion VND, an increase of 10.7% and profit after tax of 346 billion VND, an increase of 9.5%. Non-life insurance segment achieved revenue of 3,917 billion VND, up 23.5%, NPAT of 117 billion VND, up 17.5%, while Bao Viet Life achieved revenue of 11,284 billion VND, up 3.7% and PAT of 586 billion VND, up 22.3%. BVF manages net assets of more than 160,000 billion VND, an increase of 2.8%, revenue of 62 billion VND, an increase of 26%, profit after tax of 28.7 billion VND; BVSC achieved revenue of 276.3 billion VND and profit after tax of 61.6 billion VND, both increasing by double digits. Uniform growth results in insurance, fund management and securities are a positive signal for BHV/Bao Viet shares, supporting profit expectations.
486f24380a024f764167cc768b0591223b87e590: Bao Tin Minh Chau has a surprising move related to gold rings
bac04cad8b33347f9c9bed4a16af64cadb585fa8: On the afternoon of April 30, SJC gold bars at SJC, Mi Hong, Bao Tin Minh Chau, PNJ remained stable around 163 million VND/tael purchased and 166 million VND/tael sold. Gold rings and 99.99% jewelry also went sideways at 162.5 million VND/tael purchased and 165.5 million VND/tael sold, although world gold at 2:30 p.m. increased to 4,592 USD/ounce. Domestic gold prices are significantly lower than the world and lower than the historical peak of 190-191 million VND/tael in the first quarter of 2026, about 24-25 million VND/tael. Bao Tin Minh Chau offers incentives for investors, reducing the buy-sell difference by 20%, equivalent to about 600,000 VND/tael for Thang Long Dragon gold, in the context of the market spread being wide at about 3 million VND/tael. The impact on PNJ is at a cautious level: gold prices are high but the market is quiet and large gaps can inhibit short-term transactions, there is not enough data to make a clear positive assessment on PNJ shares.
edf9890c1ef337180ecdd278d16fb4c684ba8e91: Chuong Duong Corp wants to transfer part of its capital contribution to a subsidiary
e7724246439900003071cd1742fd6a5fe06a86c9: Before May 5, 2026, CDC plans to transfer 32.34% of Chuong Duong Homeland's capital at a price not lower than 190 billion VND, according to the agreed method. Chuong Duong Homeland has a charter capital of 555 billion VND, of which CDC is recording a capital contribution of 331.34 billion VND, equivalent to 59.7%. If completed, CDC's ownership ratio in Chuong Duong Homeland will decrease from 59.7% to 27.27%, helping to collect money but reduce control at the subsidiary. CDC also extended the right to buy in the offering of nearly 52.8 million shares at 1:1 ratio, priced at 10,000 VND/share, expected to collect more than 527.7 billion VND to repay debt, buy back bonds and restructure short-term debt. If the issuance is successful, CDC's charter capital will increase from more than 527.7 billion VND to nearly 1,055.5 billion VND; Short-term impact dilutes stocks but is positive for financial balance if debt pressure can be handled.
6cd4f54587d2d6c9e645944859d9c6491be5bea9: NRC Group finalizes the date to hold the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
60e66d638e26b3847412593d80ab4aca4ef26c1a: NRC Group will hold the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on June 26, 2026, the last registration date is May 20, 2026, after extending the meeting deadline to June 30, 2026 at the latest. The Congress is expected to approve the report of the Board of Directors, Audit Committee, 2025 financial statements and profit distribution, business plan and 2026 profit distribution plan. In the first quarter of 2026, NRC recorded net revenue of more than 17 billion VND, an increase of 146.4%, profit after tax of nearly 6.6 billion VND, 9.9 times higher than the same period. Profit increased mainly thanks to higher financial revenue and partial reversal of receivable provisions, so the quality of growth needs to be monitored. By March 31, 2026, total assets reached more than 2,082.6 billion VND, an increase of 5.7%, but long-term receivables were more than 1,640 billion VND, accounting for 78.7% of assets, which is a negative risk for NRC although short-term results support stock sentiment.
59b2f024ad2b5da90ece68b05a411b79eda196ef: Sanctioning a series of businesses for violations in the securities sector
f818f6e628e9b5c866484cabcfe9023a08434135: The State Securities Commission fined HLD a total of 295 million VND for incomplete information disclosure, failure to disclose information/delayed information disclosure on many loan resolutions, related transactions and violation of regulations on transactions with related parties HUDS in the years 2024-2025. HLD was fined 65 million VND for incomplete information disclosure, 92.5 million VND for not disclosing mandatory information and 137.5 million VND for transactions with shareholders/related persons that were not approved by the General Meeting of Shareholders/Board of Directors, negatively impacting the reputation of management and HLD shares. Ha Tay Trading Joint Stock Company was fined a total of 107.5 million VND, including 92.5 million VND for not announcing the resolution of the 2023-2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and 15 million VND for not appointing a person in charge of corporate governance, negative for HTT due to transparency risks. Viglacera Sanitary Equipment Company Limited was fined 3% of the transaction value at par value, more than 1.1 billion VND, because on December 26, 2025, it bought nearly 3.8 million TVA shares, equivalent to nearly 37.8 billion VND, without reporting forecasts.
d872e51fd778db6608377e5f485211afd88481bd: Binh Minh Plastic is about to pay cash dividends at a rate of 83.6%
e9a54ce65c310a1eff5e424fc4619accc48edbe1: BMP approved paying the remaining cash dividend in 2025 for the second time at a rate of 83.6%, equivalent to 8,360 VND/share. With more than 81.86 million shares in circulation, Binh Minh Plastics plans to spend nearly 684.4 billion VND, closing rights on May 20, 2026 and expected payment on June 10, 2026. Major shareholder Nawaplastic Industries owns more than 45 million BMP shares and is expected to receive more than 376.3 billion VND in dividends. In the first quarter of 2026, BMP recorded net revenue of more than 1,457.3 billion VND, an increase of 5.4%, net profit of nearly 304 billion VND, an increase of 6% and completed nearly 23.8% of the year's profit plan. Assets at the end of March 31, 2026 reached more than 3,815.5 billion VND, an increase of 19.2%; High cash dividends and rising profits are positive for BMP, although rising financial and sales costs put pressure on profit margins.
f8c57a3fcb16edce5b483552c54c007f951ac549: President Trump congratulated the partner who just shook hands with FPT
e63956be1a87c2c3fad556da2d5983f2881f2142: Mr. Trump posted on Trust that the increase in Intel shares helped the US earn $30 billion in 90 days, and congratulated Intel and the parties involved in the investment. Intel shares increased nearly 5 times after 1 year since CEO Lip-Bu Tan took office, pulling capitalization to a record level of more than 400 billion USD, reflecting expectations of benefits from AI. Intel CEO said CPU demand in data centers is exploding; The company expanded its AI CPU cooperation with Alphabet, received major commitments/agreements from the US government, SoftBank, Nvidia and a contract to produce 14A chips for Tesla. Intel's data center and AI segment achieved revenue of 5.1 billion USD in the first quarter, higher than expectations, showing a sign of positive recovery after a period of slowdown in AI. FPT announced a strategic cooperation with Intel on April 28 to deploy AI for self-operating factories, which is positive information for FPT if it can be transformed into a digital manufacturing and system integration project.
85fa1578b25f9f9d22fac5b72f76716380f05fb4: Heineken complained, Carlsberg Vietnam Beer was fined 200 million VND
a9ced5f9f33f90ac3148ff185c275f06f3090394: The National Competition Commission issued Decision 72/QD-CT dated March 23, 2026 to handle Carlsberg Vietnam Beer Company Limited for providing misleading information to attract customers of other businesses. Carlsberg Vietnam was fined 200 million VND according to point a, clause 5, Article 45 of the Competition Law 2018. The enterprise must make public corrections on its website, social networks and remove misleading information on Huda, Huda Gold, Halida beer boxes. The case comes from a complaint filed by Heineken Vietnam Brewery Company Limited. The Committee acknowledged that Carlsberg had coordinated the investigation, minimized the consequences, and voluntarily corrected it, and this was the first violation; The direct impact on listed stocks is unclear because the parties did not state the stock code.
a2ece4c870740db652664d4f68d85af42459d98a: VBMA: Individual bonds of real estate enterprises dominated in the first quarter
e5cd79de2f1c0b3fae32eaab3fc5ea852f739883: In the first quarter of 2026, VBMA recorded 13 issuances of corporate bonds worth more than 40 trillion VND, of which private issuance reached 25,805 billion VND, accounting for 64.3% and public issuance reached 14,334 billion VND, accounting for 35.7%. The real estate group dominated with more than 24 trillion VND, accounting for 60% of total issuance, while banks ranked second with 29%. Outstanding corporate bond debt at the end of the first quarter of 2026 increased by 11% over the same period to 1.32 million billion VND, equivalent to 7.1% of total outstanding credit debt, showing that the market is recovering after a sharp decline in 2022. The average issuance interest rate reached 7.81%/year, down 0.31 percentage points compared to the previous quarter, but new delinquent bonds increased by 50% to 3,732 billion VND and Just paid 57 billion VND. The maturity pressure in 2026 is nearly 204 trillion VND, of which real estate accounts for 124.7 trillion VND, 61.1%, which is a negative signal for the group of high-leverage real estate businesses even though the mobilization channel is reopening.
90be357ca91deacca376821f431ecc9515927a88: Vinaconex's first quarter profit increased by 176%, replacing a new General Director
4f6935ad760fe3fe83d43f3315a7d9fdbb2e5b7b: In the first quarter of 2026, Vinaconex (VCG) recorded net revenue of 3,424 billion VND, up 32% and net profit of 353 billion VND, up 176%, thanks to construction increasing 18% and real estate increasing 5.6 times. Financial revenue increased 400% to 234 billion VND, but total financial, sales and administrative expenses also increased 49% to 246 billion VND. The 2026 plan is quite conservative with revenue of 15.4 trillion VND, down 22% and profit after tax of 1,037 billion VND, down 73%, after the first quarter, 24% of revenue and 36% of profit have been completed. At the end of March 2026, total assets were 30.4 trillion VND, down 3%, liabilities were 17.6 trillion VND, down 6%, debt was nearly 7.1 trillion VND, accounting for 40% of total debt. VCG dismissed General Director Nguyen Xuan Dong from April 28, 2026 and appointed Mr. Pham Thai Duong for a 5-year term; Positive Q1 business results support VCG shares in the short term, but risks of construction profit margin, low real estate liquidity and senior personnel fluctuations are negative points.
36530915d191495cd8906c973edafe96b7c1997c: “Birds are afraid of curved branches”: The invisible resistance of the stock market
66bf8dce2b48b88fe7962ca8f54f3459126d2ae4: The article emphasizes that the "birds are afraid of bent branches" mentality is the major drag on the stock market, when geopolitical or policy shocks often only act as triggers for sell-offs. In March, VN-Index decreased in 14/21 sessions, on March 9 alone it lost more than 115 points, equivalent to 6.51%, in the context of Brent oil rising to 111 USD/barrel. A similar shock was the April 3 session, when the VN-Index dropped nearly 88 points, equivalent to 6.68%, after news that the US imposed a 46% reciprocal tax on Vietnam, then recovered when there was news of a 90-day tax delay. With individual investors accounting for more than 80% of transactions, the market easily falls into a cycle of sell-offs, technical pullbacks, FOMO and then losses, causing many people to buy at the top and sell at the bottom. The overall impact is negative in the short term on market sentiment and liquidity, but there are no specific stocks in the article to evaluate separately.
b70983b12615b40304fccf079b51732f32a48272: What's notable about the real estate company's capital withdrawal before PC1 stock plummeted?
adc2af6ed2ed4263456684f7c67a20a590a9f338: PC1 terminated its investment in CT2 Real Estate Investment Joint Stock Company in early March 2026 and updated in mid-April 2026 that the liquidation was completed. The investment has an original price of 300 billion VND, corresponding to 30 million shares and 49% of charter capital of CT2 Real Estate. CT2 Real Estate is the investor of The Keish project in Long Bien, Hanoi, the project has a total capital of 1,450 billion VND, an area of ​​4,271 m2, including 18 floors and 280 apartments. After announcing the completion of liquidation, PC1 shares decreased from more than 27,000 VND/share to less than 20,000 VND/share as of April 29, 2026, equivalent to a decrease of nearly 30% in about 10 sessions. On April 29, 2026 session, PC1 matched nearly 41.9 million shares, worth more than 820 billion VND; The capital withdrawal information is not enough to conclude the cause of the price decrease, but the price movement is negative in the short term for PC1.
c4213a1b5ae5b9d261db4bf27d5a52e66ed0a295: First quarter net profit is more than 900 billion, Novaland General Director receives a salary of 400 million/month
1e69a4355133c01743fae843199f5f0232ec96ff: In the first quarter of 2026, Novaland (NVL) recorded net revenue of 3,587 billion VND, an increase of 102% and net profit of 901 billion VND, reversing from a loss of 443 billion VND in the same period. The main driver is real estate transfer revenue reaching 3,452 billion VND, an increase of 111% thanks to handovers at Sunrise Riverside, Aqua City, NovaWorld Phan Thiet, NovaWorld Ho Tram and land use rights transfer. In 2026, NVL targets net revenue of 22,715 billion VND and profit after tax of 1,852 billion VND, after 3 months completing 16% and 46% of the plan, respectively. At the end of March 2026, total assets reached 253.1 trillion VND, inventory 154.6 trillion VND, liabilities 193.3 trillion VND, outstanding loans nearly 69 trillion VND and bond debt decreased to 23.8 trillion VND. The recovery in business results is a positive signal for NVL, but inventory pressure, large debt and financial costs are still risks that need to be monitored.
a52e96cec3509b913939a8d7e51742442bf1022f: Bad debt improved, VietinBank increased pre-tax profit in the first quarter by 65%.
13c24baf85f73f38db345768b19c1f14702c793b: In the first quarter of 2026, VietinBank (CTG) recorded a pre-tax profit of more than 11,139 billion VND, an increase of 63% thanks to uniform growth in business segments and reduced provisions. Net interest income increased 25% to 19,385 billion VND, service profit increased 15% to 1,847 billion VND, while net profit from operating activities increased 26% to 18,840 billion VND. Credit risk provision costs decreased by 5% to VND 7,700 billion, directly supporting profit growth. By March 31, 2026, total assets increased by 6% to more than 2.9 million billion VND, customer loans were more than 2 million billion VND and deposits were more than 1.8 million billion VND, both up 2% compared to the beginning of the year. Bad debt decreased by 6% to 20,598 billion VND, bad debt ratio decreased from 1.1% to 1.02%, which is a positive signal for CTG.
80a309d5b67ded37a0842ea8374fded823864935: Kinh Bac's first quarter profit decreased by more than 70%, debt exceeded 30 trillion
b8ba20a7589caebc0be55a227bf6b8be4ece0a4c: In the first quarter of 2026, KBC recorded net revenue of nearly 1,336 billion VND, down 56%, net profit of more than 224 billion VND, down 71% and the lowest in 5 quarters. The main reason is that industrial park revenue is only nearly 732 billion VND, down 71%, while total financial, sales and management costs increased 47% to more than 424 billion VND. Compared to the 2026 plan including revenue of 10,000 billion VND and profit after tax of 3,000 billion VND, KBC has only completed about 14% of revenue and 9% of profit. By the end of March 2026, total assets reached more than 71.8 trillion VND, inventory more than 29.5 trillion VND, cash decreased by 17% to more than 6.9 trillion VND. Liabilities increased to more than 44.8 trillion VND, financial loans exceeded 30.1 trillion VND and accounted for 67% of total debt, creating negative pressure on KBC shares due to a sharp decline in profits, high leverage and the risk of not meeting the plan.
efb2b0e89149b019cec3f9338331355e5bbea765: Chinese pharmaceutical giant spent 6,000 billion VND to acquire Imexpharm
e50637a5e85becd3856c1cf6c860ae56fe2bb183: On April 23, Lian SGP Holding completed the public offering of IMP, buying 104.5 million shares from 109 investors and increasing its ownership in Imexpharm to 67.87% of charter capital. The offering price is 57,400 VND/share, estimated to be a deal of nearly 6,000 billion VND, making an indirect subsidiary of Livzon Pharmaceutical Group the dominant shareholder of IMP. Livzon is committed to maintaining a stable business strategy and expanding high-tech products on the EU-GMP line, which is a positive medium-term factor for IMP if it can support technology, products and markets. The selling afternoon included the SK group with SK Investment Vina III registering to sell 68.8 million shares, Binh Minh Kim selling 15 million shares, KBA selling 11.3 million shares, and a number of leaders selling in the period April 15-May 14, 2026 and April 16-May 15, 2026. Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on April 22 approved the 2026 plan with revenue of 3,200 billion VND, profit before tax of 502 billion VND, increasing by 9.8% and 12.5% ​​respectively, expected dividends of 5%-8%, generally supporting IMP's valuation.
a1d0615415347c1c639cc82206b002f1f99d1f8a: An animal feed production company reported a record profit of more than 10 billion VND per day
becbd361f242572ccf2e5edb4f83621a0325b017: GreenFeed Vietnam reported a record net profit of more than 3,656 billion VND in fiscal year 2025, equivalent to more than 10 billion VND/day, the highest ever. ROE increases to 39.63% from 34.87% in 2024, showing that capital efficiency continues to improve after profits have jumped sharply from VND 437 billion in 2023 to VND 2,106 billion in 2024. By December 31, 2025, equity reached 9,228 billion VND, an increase of nearly 3,200 billion VND, including contributed capital of 5,125 billion VND and undistributed after-tax profit of 4,449 billion VND. Total liabilities at the end of the year were 6,868 billion VND, an increase of nearly 1,800 billion VND, of which bank loans were 1,698 billion VND and outstanding bonds were 700 billion VND. Bond batch GFVCH2128001 issued on November 3, 2021, initial value of 1,000 billion VND, maturity June 15, 2028, interest rate 6.53%/year; Positive information for bondholders but the article does not mention listed stocks to evaluate the market price impact.
992a755fd112ca1bc5776ade66dedab6479881c4: CPH closes the right to receive cash dividends in 2025 on May 13, 2026, with expected payment on May 25, 2026 at a rate of 20.22%, equivalent to 2,022 VND/share, nearly 7 times higher than the market price of 300 VND/share. With 4.4 million outstanding shares, the company plans to spend nearly 9 billion VND, while UPCoM shares have almost no liquidity due to its concentrated ownership structure. Hai Phong City People's Committee holds 64.5% of equitized capital, Hoang Phat Company holds 10%, Chairman of the Board of Directors Nguyen Hong Le holds 5.33%. In 2025, CPH will achieve net revenue of 151 billion VND and profit after tax of 11 billion VND; The goods segment achieved revenue of 84 billion VND with a gross profit margin of 45%, while grave construction reached a margin of 64%. The 2026 plan sets revenue of 130 billion VND and profit after tax of 10 billion VND, down 16% and 9% respectively, so high dividends are positive for existing shareholders but the impact on equitization price is limited because liquidity is very low.
a0362b65a0397be3b16d0370f0b0c93acfd6fd50: Petrolimex changed a series of senior personnel
49ab48b416ca7a1c85dc008adb9f66a5cfb351e5: Petrolimex appointed Mr. Takuji Ogasawara as a Member of the Board of Directors for the term 2026-2031 and Mr. Do Huy Thao as a Member of the Supervisory Board from April 24, 2026. Mr. Endo Tsuyoshi and Mr. Okuma Atsushi resign from April 24, 2026, and Mr. Dao Nam Hai ceases to be a member of the Board of Directors from May 30, 2025. After the change, Petrolimex's Board of Directors has 7 members with Mr. Pham Van Thanh as Chairman, and the Supervisory Board has 5 people with Mr. Dang Quang Tuan as Head. With PLX shares, Petrolimex has 43,266 shareholders, but the group of non-major shareholders only holds 9.419% of voting rights, lower than the minimum requirement of 10% to meet public company conditions. PLX has 1 year to fix it, while the ownership structure concentrated in the State at 75.87% and ENEOS at 13.08% could create negative short-term/legal risks for PLX shares if the free-float ratio cannot be handled.
1f701883b532c80e18439871994863476846569f: Why did Japan award the Rising Sun Medal to FPT Chairman Truong Gia Binh?
11c5ecbd6048bb580a2a9fdb5682c2f43c9a93e6: On April 29, 2026, the Japanese Government announced the award of the Rising Sun Medal to FPT Chairman Truong Gia Binh for his contribution to Vietnam - Japan relations. FPT was a pioneer in exporting software to Japan about 20 years ago, creating a foundation for Vietnamese IT businesses to expand in this market. In Japan, FPT currently has more than 5,000 employees in 18 offices/research centers, along with more than 18,000 global experts serving the Japanese market and more than 450 customers. Being recognized by Japan strengthens FPT's brand reputation in the fields of digital transformation, AI, semiconductors and strategic technology cooperation between the two countries. The impact is generally positive for FPT shares in terms of image and position in the Japanese market, but the news is more about recognition of reputation than a direct factor that changes short-term business results.
589b5316122fe7f147981401a187aa1679e102b6: Vietnam's largest pharmaceutical enterprise is about to pay a 50% cash dividend, the Japanese "giant" is full of money
813d24fa709ec9f14bccb1e6da75fe9ef32abcb4: Hau Giang Pharmaceutical DHG will close the rights on May 12, 2025 to pay the first cash dividend of 2025 at the rate of 50%, equivalent to 5,000 VND/share, expected payment on May 28, 2025. With more than 130.7 million shares in circulation, DHG plans to spend nearly 653 billion VND, of which Taisho Pharmaceutical receives about 333 billion VND and SCIC receives about 280 billion VND. For the whole year of 2025, DHG has approved a total cash dividend of 100%, equivalent to about 1,307 billion VND, with another 50% installment expected around September 2025. In 2026, the company plans to maintain a cash dividend of 7,000 VND/share and deduct 3% of profit after tax for the bonus and welfare fund. High and stable dividend information is positive for DHG in terms of shareholder cash flow, but the fact that the free transfer rate is only 5.68% and has not met the conditions for a public company according to the March 23, 2026 list is a risk that needs to be monitored in terms of compliance and stock liquidity.
357880ad72a58456ea8c6dcd692e621c5313a57e: With the advantage of "golden forest, silver sea", Vietnam can unlock the "treasure" of 40 billion USD that the whole world pursues.
696d8f76134e32048f26723b9e75eb4e91bdb12c: The carbon credit market is considered by SHS to be a growing "green asset", with a global voluntary scale expected to reach 10-40 billion USD by 2030, supporting the Net Zero 2050 goal. ASEAN has great potential thanks to renewable energy and carbon absorption ecosystems, in which the three sectors AFOLU, electricity and transportation account for about 65% of the region's emissions. Vietnam has advantages from forests, seas, agriculture and renewable energy, expected to create 103 million carbon credits by 2050, while 9 Southeast Asian markets can reach 1,267.5 million credits. As of November 2022, Vietnam has 276 CDM projects and nearly 29.4 million carbon credits have been issued, showing the initial foundation for the domestic market. The legal framework is entering the implementation phase with Decree 119/2025/ND-CP dated June 2025, 2023-2025 roadmap for preparation, 2025-2027 ETS pilot and from 2028 official operation; long-term positive impact for renewable energy businesses
e30ba1206baa91845670290d29960c10890733cf: Why did Shark Hung suddenly submit his resignation at Cen Land?
c6bc4cfa1fb387b79fa7d2b6726e34f7611b5ea3: Mr. Pham Thanh Hung (Shark Hung) has submitted his resignation as member of the Board of Directors of Cen Land (CRE) for the 2023-2028 term to focus on personal work and new directions. Cen Land will present its resignation to the General Meeting of Shareholders for approval, scheduled for the annual meeting on May 22, 2026. Previously at the end of 2025, Mr. Hung denied information spread on social networks related to him and Hyra Holdings, and affirmed that his startup investment activities have no legal, financial or operational connection with Cen Land. Cen Land's 2025 audited business results recorded revenue of about 1,324 billion VND, profit after tax of 75 billion VND, an increase of nearly 80%. The impact on CRE is neutral to negative in the short term due to changes in Board personnel and psychological risks from rumors, but is partly supported by strong increases in profits.
2b615fdab657802960107266dfa061ca2093b3ca: Vietcombank increased pre-tax profit by 9% in the first quarter, suspected debt increased suddenly
4d4fad243a22dc6b038949fffca6b1b19f11ef30: Vietcombank (VCB) announced its consolidated financial statements for the first quarter of 2026 with pre-tax profit of nearly 11,803 billion VND, up 9% YoY even though credit risk provision costs increased 7 times to more than 2,493 billion VND. Net interest income reached 17,651 billion VND, an increase of 29%; Service profit increased 17% to 943 billion VND, other operating profit increased 29% to 857 billion VND, but foreign exchange trading decreased 17% to 1,677 billion VND. By March 31, 2026, total assets increased by 4% to 2.55 million billion VND, customer loans increased by 5% to 1.75 million billion VND while deposits increased only 1% to 1.68 million billion VND. Bad debt increased by 12% to 10,868 billion VND, doubtful debt increased 7 times to 1,586 billion VND, debt with potential loss of capital accounted for 76% of total bad debt, but the ratio of bad debt/new outstanding debt increased from 0.58% to 0.62%. The impact on VCB is mixed: rising profits and credit provide positive short-term support, but deteriorating asset quality and sharp increases in provisions are negative signals to watch.
2e1fd67b79b67fd6ada738871e38ede0ceb24a1b: Brent oil surpassed 118 USD/barrel after a new move from Mr. Trump
3a08802464698f1b6ba879b3ebb7370aa1efa69c: World oil prices increased sharply on April 29 after Mr. Trump announced that he would maintain the blockade on Iran until the country accepts the nuclear agreement. Brent oil futures increased about 6% to 118.03 USD/barrel, while WTI increased nearly 7% to 106.88 USD/barrel. Tensions escalated when Iran refused to reopen the Strait of Hormuz if the US did not lift the blockade, blocking oil exports from the Middle East. The UAE leaving OPEC from May 1 is considered by ING to be a blow to OPEC's influence, but the short-term impact is less than the fluctuations in the Persian Gulf. High oil prices are a negative factor for businesses that use a lot of fuel, transportation and production, while they can positively support upstream oil and gas stocks if prices remain high.
